# VS Furnitures

> Furniture contractor and custom carpentry business serving all of Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India. In business for 30+ years. Family-run. Free site visit within 7 km.

VS Furnitures is a trusted furniture contractor based in Nanda Nagar, Indore. We design, source, and build complete furniture projects for homes and offices across Indore — modular kitchens, wardrobes, TV units, living room furniture, office furniture, and repairs. We offer two working models: With Material (we supply everything) or Percentage Basis (client supplies material, we provide craftsmanship). All work comes with a 1-year written warranty.

## Contact

- Phone: +91 9827348796
- WhatsApp: +91 9977250002
- Location: Nanda Nagar, Indore, Madhya Pradesh 452011
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM

## Services

- [Modular Kitchens](https://vsfurnitures.in/services/modular-kitchen/): Custom L-shaped, U-shaped, straight, and island modular kitchens. Soft-close hardware, quality shutters, loft units. 700+ kitchens built across Indore.
- [Wardrobes & Bedroom Furniture](https://vsfurnitures.in/services/wardrobes-bedroom/): Floor-to-ceiling sliding and hinged wardrobes, dressing tables, complete bedroom sets.
- [Furniture Repair & Restoration](https://vsfurnitures.in/services/furniture-repair/): Polishing, veneer repair, hinge replacement, full restoration. Same-day repairs available. 10% off first repair.
- [All Services](https://vsfurnitures.in/services/): Office furniture, TV units, living room furniture, false ceiling, door and window frames, custom carpentry, furniture assembly.

## Portfolio

- [Our Work](https://vsfurnitures.in/our-work/): Gallery of completed projects organised by category.
- [Modular Kitchens Gallery](https://vsfurnitures.in/our-work/modular-kitchens/): 35 completed kitchen projects.
- [TV Units Gallery](https://vsfurnitures.in/our-work/tv-units/): 24 completed TV unit projects.
- [Wardrobes Gallery](https://vsfurnitures.in/our-work/wardrobes/): 21 completed wardrobe projects.
- [Living Room Gallery](https://vsfurnitures.in/our-work/living-room/): Living room furniture projects.
- [Office Furniture Gallery](https://vsfurnitures.in/our-work/office/): Office furniture and workstation projects.
- [Repairs Gallery](https://vsfurnitures.in/our-work/repairs/): Furniture repair and restoration work.

## Areas Served

Vijay Nagar, Palasia, Mahalaxmi Nagar, Tulsi Nagar, Rajendra Nagar, Nipaniya, Niranjanpur, Omex City Phase 1 & 2, Dewas Naka, Talawali Chanda, County Walk, Singapur Township, Ansal Township, Shiv Vatika, SS Infinitus, Apollo DB City, Annapurna, Nanda Nagar, MR-10, Scheme 54, Old Palasia, AB Road — and all areas of Indore.

## Key Facts

- 30+ years in business
- 700+ modular kitchens built
- 150+ homes fully furnished
- 1-year written warranty on all work
- Free site visit within 7 km, no obligation
- Two pricing models: With Material or Percentage Basis
